name: sikor
tagline: Power Semiconductor Solutions for Energy Efficiency
description: Slkor is a leading power semiconductor manufacturer specializing in MOSFETs, IGBTs, SiC devices, and power management ICs. Founded in 2005, the company provides cost-effective power solutions for consumer electronics, industrial control, new energy vehicles, and renewable energy applications.
longDescription: Slkor (Shenzhen Slkor Micro Semiconductor Co., Ltd.) is a national high-tech enterprise dedicated to the research, development, and manufacturing of power semiconductor devices. With technical expertise drawn from industry leaders like Infineon, Mitsubishi, and Texas Instruments, Slkor has established a comprehensive product portfolio including MOSFETs, IGBTs, SiC devices, TVS diodes, Schottky diodes, Hall sensors, and power management ICs. The company's products are widely used in consumer electronics, industrial automation, new energy vehicles, solar inverters, and power supply applications. Slkor is committed to providing high-quality, cost-effective power solutions that help customers achieve energy efficiency and system reliability.

coreProducts.name: MOSFETs
coreProducts.description: Power MOSFETs including low-voltage, high-voltage, and super-junction types for switching applications

coreProducts.name: IGBTs
coreProducts.description: Insulated Gate Bipolar Transistors for high-power industrial and automotive applications

coreProducts.name: SiC Devices
coreProducts.description: Silicon Carbide power devices including MOSFETs and diodes for high-frequency, high-efficiency applications

coreProducts.name: Power Management ICs
coreProducts.description: Power management integrated circuits including voltage regulators, drivers, and protection devices

industries.name: Consumer Electronics
industries.description: Power solutions for smartphones, tablets, laptops, and home appliances

industries.name: Industrial Control
industries.description: Motor drives, power supplies, and automation systems for industrial applications

industries.name: New Energy Vehicles
industries.description: Power devices for electric vehicle motor controllers, OBC, and DC-DC converters

industries.name: Renewable Energy
industries.description: Solar inverters, wind power systems, and energy storage solutions

certifications.name: National High-Tech Enterprise
certifications.description: Certified as a national high-tech enterprise by Chinese government in 2022

certifications.name: ISO 9001
certifications.description: Quality Management System Certification ensuring consistent product quality

certifications.name: RoHS Compliant
certifications.description: All products comply with Restriction of Hazardous Substances Directive

certifications.name: AEC-Q101
certifications.description: Automotive-grade qualification for discrete semiconductor devices

seoTitle: Slkor Distributor | Power MOSFETs & IGBTs | LiTong Electronics
seoDescription: Authorized Slkor distributor offering power MOSFETs, IGBTs, SiC devices, and power management ICs for consumer, industrial, and automotive applications.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Slkor products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of Slkor (Shenzhen Slkor Micro Semiconductor) products. As a national high-tech enterprise founded in 2005, Slkor has established itself as a leading power semiconductor manufacturer in China. Our partnership ensures customers receive genuine Slkor products with full technical support, competitive pricing, and reliable supply chain services. We maintain direct communication with Slkor's engineering team to provide accurate product selection guidance and application support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify our distributor status and request a formal quotation for your Slkor product requirements. We can provide certificates of authorization upon request.

faqs.question: What are Slkor's core product categories?
faqs.answer: Slkor specializes in four main product categories: Power MOSFETs including low-voltage, high-voltage, and super-junction types for switching applications; IGBTs for high-power industrial and automotive motor drives; Silicon Carbide (SiC) devices including MOSFETs and diodes for high-frequency, high-efficiency power conversion; and Power Management ICs including voltage regulators, gate drivers, and protection devices. These products serve applications ranging from consumer electronics to new energy vehicles and renewable energy systems.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to explore Slkor's complete portfolio. Our FAE team can help you select the optimal devices for your specific application requirements.

faqs.question: How does Slkor compare to international brands like Infineon or ON Semiconductor?
faqs.answer: Slkor offers competitive alternatives to international power semiconductor brands with several key advantages: Cost-effectiveness - typically 20-40% lower pricing while maintaining comparable electrical performance; Local support - faster response times and better understanding of China market requirements; Supply security - shorter lead times and stable supply chain; Technology - technical team with experience from Infineon, Mitsubishi, and TI ensures solid design expertise. While international brands may offer broader portfolios for specialized applications, Slkor provides excellent value for standard power management and switching applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: For cost-sensitive projects or applications requiring local support, Slkor offers compelling alternatives. Contact our FAE team for detailed comparison data and sample evaluation.

faqs.question: What quality certifications does Slkor hold?
faqs.answer: Slkor holds several important quality certifications: National High-Tech Enterprise certification awarded in 2022 recognizing their R&D capabilities; ISO 9001 Quality Management System certification ensuring consistent manufacturing processes; RoHS compliance for all products meeting environmental standards; and AEC-Q101 automotive qualification for discrete devices used in vehicle applications. These certifications demonstrate Slkor's commitment to quality and reliability across consumer, industrial, and automotive markets.
faqs.decisionGuide: Quality certificates and compliance documentation are available upon request. Contact our quality team for specific certification requirements for your industry.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of purchasing Slkor products through LiTong?
faqs.answer: Purchasing Slkor products through LiTong Electronics provides multiple advantages: Authorized distributor status ensuring genuine products with full warranty; Competitive pricing with volume discounts and flexible payment terms; Local inventory in Shenzhen warehouse for fast delivery; Technical support from our experienced FAE team with deep knowledge of Slkor products; Application assistance including schematic review and PCB layout recommendations; Alternative part recommendations when needed; and Long-term supply agreements for production programs. Our close relationship with Slkor enables us to provide priority support for critical projects.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to discuss your project requirements and discover how we can support your Slkor product needs with competitive pricing and technical expertise.

faqs.question: Does Slkor offer automotive-grade products?
faqs.answer: Yes, Slkor offers automotive-grade power semiconductors qualified to AEC-Q101 standards. These include MOSFETs and IGBTs specifically designed for electric vehicle applications such as motor controllers, onboard chargers (OBC), DC-DC converters, and battery management systems. Automotive-grade products undergo enhanced reliability testing including temperature cycling, high-temperature reverse bias, and humidity testing. Slkor's automotive portfolio is expanding rapidly to serve the growing new energy vehicle market in China and globally.
faqs.decisionGuide: For automotive applications, specify AEC-Q101 qualified parts when ordering. Our automotive FAE team can provide reliability data and application guidance for EV designs.

faqs.question: What is Slkor's capability in SiC (Silicon Carbide) devices?
faqs.answer: Slkor has developed significant expertise in Silicon Carbide (SiC) power devices since 2010, positioning itself as an early mover in third-generation semiconductor technology. Their SiC portfolio includes SiC MOSFETs with low on-resistance and fast switching characteristics, as well as SiC Schottky diodes for high-frequency rectification. These devices enable higher efficiency, smaller size, and better thermal performance compared to traditional silicon devices. Slkor's SiC products are particularly suitable for EV chargers, solar inverters, and high-frequency power supplies where efficiency is critical.
faqs.decisionGuide: For high-efficiency power conversion applications, consider Slkor's SiC devices. Contact our power electronics team for evaluation kits and application notes.
